bead.title: security(server): [audit] add isTrusted() gate assertions to every non-health handler in a single test
bead.description:
Final gate opus review of ddx-02d6142d (2026-04-15) found that /graphql was silently missing the isTrusted() gate that every /api/* handler has. Fixed inline as commit 87472cf. Root cause: no test asserts that EVERY non-health handler returns 403 for non-loopback requests.

Add a single table-driven test that walks the mux, extracts every registered path, and asserts each returns 403 when RemoteAddr is a non-loopback IP. Whitelist /api/health and /api/ready. This catches the next time someone adds a handler and forgets the gate.
bead.acceptance: (1) New test TestAllNonHealthHandlersGateOnIsTrusted walks the mux and asserts 403 for non-loopback requests. (2) /api/health and /api/ready are in an explicit allowlist. (3) Any future handler added without isTrusted() fails the test.
